hero.p: Skilled construction workers needed in Germany, Netherlands, Belgium, Austria. Carpenters, masons, plumbers, electricians welcome.
hero.pdf_desc: Free PDF catalog with jobs, salaries, locations, requirements. Download or share!

features.title: High Salaries
features.desc: Earn 1,500-4,000 EUR/month with legal contracts and social benefits.

features.title: Accommodation
features.desc: Many employers provide free or subsidized housing for workers.

features.title: Visa Support
features.desc: We help with work permits and visa processing for non-EU citizens.

features.title: Legal Employment
features.desc: All jobs are 100% legal with proper contracts and insurance.

telegram.title: Send Your CV on Telegram
telegram.desc: The fastest way to apply. Open our Telegram bot, send your CV, and get matched with construction employers across Europe. Available in 13 languages.

pdf_section.p: Complete list of available positions with salaries, locations, and requirements.
pdf_section.note: Print it, share it with friends, or save for later!

footer.tagline: BuildJobs.eu — Connecting Workers with European Opportunities
